runtime.summary: tenet-ui ships its design tokens AND its component styles as ONE stylesheet (tenet-ui/styles.css). Every var(--token) and every Tenet-* component class is undefined until that stylesheet is imported once at the app root. Theming is just an attribute — data-color-mode="light|dark" on an ancestor (usually <html>); :root defaults to light. There is NO provider component to mount. Without the import the UI renders fully unstyled: transparent/paper-less background, no borders, default serif/sans fallback, collapsed spacing, broken controls — even though the code 'uses tokens and components'. This is the #1 failure mode; the runtime audit gate exists to catch it.

themeAttribute.name: data-color-mode
themeAttribute.appliedTo: the documentElement (or any ancestor of the UI)
